Tokamak zk-EVM Synthesizer

Tokamak zk-EVM Synthesizer publishes two consumer packages that turn a Tokamak L2 transaction snapshot into circuit-ready artifacts.

Package chooser:
- Use @tokamak-zk-evm/synthesizer-node when you want a Node.js CLI that reads JSON files from disk and writes JSON outputs back to disk.
- Use @tokamak-zk-evm/synthesizer-web when you want a browser-facing API that accepts payload objects or uploaded files and runs without runtime subcircuit downloads.

Shared input model:
- previousState
- transaction
- blockInfo
- contractCodes

Shared output model:
- placementVariables.json
- instance.json
- instance_description.json
- permutation.json
- state_snapshot.json
- step_log.json
- message_code_addresses.json

Subcircuit library relationship:
- The Node package resolves @tokamak-zk-evm/subcircuit-library from the installed dependency at runtime.
- The web package bundles the published subcircuit-library JSON and WASM artifacts at build time.

Canonical docs:
- README.md
- node-cli/README.md
- web-app/README.md
- docs/README.md
- docs/maintainer-guide.md
- docs/architecture.md
